case_title: EDWARD DUCKWORTH VS. MISSION ORGANIC CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY DUCKWORTH, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC CENTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 150.00 - SERVED JUL-16-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUCKWORTH, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC CENTER $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,505.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-30-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT. CASE SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES IN OPEN COURT, PRIOR TO THE HEARING. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALLEN SIDELNIK--OPERATOR OF BUSINESS. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
